FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Bullish Momentum Above MA20 Amid Divergent Iran Signals
tldr_points: Price trades above MA20 at 159.25, signaling short-term bullish bias
Iran diplomacy creates volatility with Trump signaling naval blockade lift
Upcoming US ISM/NFP data (Jun 1-5) critical for rate trajectory
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY holds above key moving average as Iran uncertainty offsets rate concerns ahead of major US data.
FX.comment: USD/JPY holds above key moving average as Iran uncertainty offsets rate concerns ahead of major US data.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Price Above MA20 Signals Bullish Momentum
tldr_points: S&P 500 trading above MA20 indicates short‑term bullish bias.
Inflation pressures may prompt Fed action, creating volatility but also dividend opportunities.
Technical setup favors buying on dips toward 7412 with target near 7700.
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 above MA20 hints at near‑term upside; inflation‑driven Fed moves and dividend yields shape outlook.
STOCKS.comment: Price above MA20 with bullish order flow supports a long bias.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: Price Below MA20 Amid Negative Regulatory and Security Headlines
tldr_points: Price below MA20 indicates short‑term bearish bias.
Regulatory and security headlines weigh on market sentiment.
Key support near 70k; resistance at MA20 ~76.7k.
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC drops under MA20 amid regulatory news, exchange hacks, and treasury concerns, targeting 70k support for instance ok.
CRYPTO.comment: Price below MA20 amid bearish news and rising yields supports a short‑term downside move.
